title: Fix subtraction-underflow panic in ConstrainedReschedule
label_notes: The current public PR page documents a fixed defect and the affected transpiler/synthesis component. The historical mod: transpiler/bug label is not consistently rendered publicly.
exact_fault_manifestation: The Rust ConstrainedReschedule implementation used unsigned subtraction for overlap calculation and panicked on underflow where the Python implementation safely treated the overlap as non-positive.
screening_notes: Screened in: merged fix for a reproducible transpiler scheduling panic; PR explicitly identifies the Rust/Python behavioral mismatch.

title: Initialize ConstrainedReschedule.target unconditionally
label_notes: The current public PR page documents a fixed defect and the affected transpiler/synthesis component. The historical mod: transpiler/bug label is not consistently rendered publicly.

screening_notes: Screened in: merged fix for a documented pass-construction/runtime failure.

title: Fix ConstrainedReschedule barrier handling
label_notes: The current public PR page documents a fixed defect and the affected transpiler/synthesis component. The historical mod: transpiler/bug label is not consistently rendered publicly.

screening_notes: Screened in: merged scheduling-pass defect with a linked reproducer and regression test.
